name: anime-vocab-coach
description: Learn Japanese from anime — Chrome extension with romaji-first SRS, Listening Mode, and optional cloud sync. Site: animevocab.com
author: Atharva Kanherkar (https://animevocab.com)

scripts.pack: npm run typecheck && npm run build && mkdir -p dist && rm -f dist/anime-vocab-coach.zip && cd extension && zip -rq ../dist/anime-vocab-coach.zip . -x 'icons/icon.svg' -x '*.DS_Store' && cd .. && echo 'Built dist/anime-vocab-coach.zip'
scripts.deploy:api: cd backend && npm ci && npx wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml
